headline: Warren Buffett’s Investment Advice Is Putting Retirement Portfolios at Risk
summary: Few investors command more credibility than Warren Buffett. During the six decades he led Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK-A)(NYSE:BRK-B), shareholders enjoyed a cumulative return of roughly 6,099,294%! That works out to a 19.7% compound annual growth rate, compared with approximately 46,000% for the S&P 500, or 10.5% annually. Yet Buffett has long argued that most investors should ... Warren Buffett’s Investment Advice Is Putting Retirement Portfolios at Risk
